p.strong: Single sorted linked list with logical bucket regions

div.p: Key Insight: Buckets don't contain elements • Buckets are logical regions in a single list • Sentinel nodes mark where each bucket begins • Elements between sentinels belong to that bucket • Resizing only adds new sentinels—no element movement!

Reverse-bit ordering ensures: When bucket 0 splits into 0 and 2: • Bucket 0 keeps: so_keys 0x0..., 0x4..., 0x8... • Bucket 2 gets: so_keys 0x2..., 0x6..., 0xA... These groups are contiguous in the sorted list!
